ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Outlook Server Update – Thursday 2:00‑4:00 AM
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the Outlook mail servers will undergo a mandatory firmware upgrade on Thursday, 23 March from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM PST. During this window, you may experience intermittent email service disruptions. All users are strongly encouraged to save work and log out before the maintenance window.

Key points:
• Expected drop‑in time: 10–15 minutes
• No re‑authentication required – access will resume automatically
• Emails queued during the outage will be delivered once services are back online

We apologize for any inconvenience. If you encounter problems post‑maintenance, please open a support ticket through the IT Service portal or email support@company.com.

Thanks for your cooperation,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: ALERT: Your Email Account Has Been Compromised!
spam.body:
Urgent Action Required

Dear Valued Employee,

Our fraud detection system has detected suspicious login activity on your corporate email. For your own and company security, we have temporarily suspended access to your account.

To restore access immediately, you must verify your identity by clicking the secure link below:
<URL>

Failure to verify within 60 minutes will result in a permanent lock‑out and potential disciplinary action.

Security Operations Center
